zh.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espa: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maior Afonso de Cambra於大約1240年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛坎布拉時，她的父親Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela61歲，母親Urraca Pires da Ribeira47歲。她和Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh-hans.Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espa: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maior Afonso de Cambra于大约1240年出生在葡萄牙艾維洛坎布拉时，她的父亲Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela61岁，母亲Urraca Pires da Ribeira47岁。她和Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Afonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Antonio, Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Domingos, Ana, Mario, Abilio, Alfredo, Americo, Arlindo, Francisco, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Caetano, Lidio.
Portuguese: from the personal name Afonso, an equivalent of Spanish Alfonso .

variants.name: Alfonso
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Carlos, Jorge, Pedro, Ramon, Luis, Rafael, Jesus, Gustavo.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Elio, Heriberto, Leonardo, Lorenzo, Aldo, Angelo, Annamaria, Antonino, Carmelo, Carmine.
Spanish and southern Italian: from the personal name Alfonso, derived from the Visigothic name Adefonsus, formed from Gothic hathu ‘war’ + funs ‘ready’. Compare Alphonso .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cambra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Aragonese, Catalan, Galician, and Portuguese: variant of Cámara or Câmara (see Camara ).
Galician and Portuguese: habitational name from any of the places so called in Galicia (Spain) and Portugal, of pre-Roman origin. Compare   De Cambra  .

variants.name: De Cambra
meanings: Catalan, Portuguese, and Galician: variant of Cambra , with the addition of preposition de ‘from’.

variants.name: Camara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Jose, Jorge, Ana, Francisco, Luis, Pedro, Juan, Alejandro, Armando, Augusto.  Portuguese Joao, Duarte, Joaquim, Afonso, Heitor, Manoel, Marcio, Messias.  African/Muslim Mamadou, Boubacar, Mamady, Aboubacar, Amadou, Bakary, Fatou, Ousmane, Babacar, Balla, Brahima, Hamidou.

Spanish (Cámara) and Portuguese (Câmara): from Spanish cámara, Portuguese câmara ‘(main) room’ (from Latin camera), hence an occupational name for a courtier or servant who had access to the private living quarters of a king or noble.
West African (mainly Guinea, Senegal, Mali, and Ivory Coast): from the name of the Kamara clan of the Mandinka and closely related Soninke peoples; see   Kamara   1.

nameMeanings.name: Maior
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Maior Afonso de Cambra was born about 1240, in Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal, her father, Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela, was 61 and her mother, Urraca Pires da Ribeira, was 47. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maior Afonso de Cambra est née environ 1240, à Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal, son père, Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Urraca Pires da Ribeira, avait 47 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maior Afonso de Cambra um 1240 in Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela 61 und ihre Mutter Urraca Pires da Ribeira 47. Sie hatte mit Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maior Afonso de Cambra è nata il circa 1240 nel Cambra, Aveiro, Portogallo, sua padre, Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Urraca Pires da Ribeira, aveva 47 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.

ja.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレド
ja.Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal: ポルトガルエイベイロカンブラ
ja.Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espa: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレド
ja.lifeSummary: Maior Afonso de Cambraが約1240年にポルトガルエイベイロカンブラで生まれた時，父Afonso Anes de Riba de Viselaは61歳，母Urraca Pires da Ribeiraは47歳であった。彼女はFerdinand Gonçalves de Chancinoとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Maior Afonso de Cambra(이)가 대략 1240년 포르투갈 에브이로 캄브라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Urraca Pires da Ribeira(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maior Afonso de Cambra nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal, seu pai, Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Pires da Ribeira, tinha 47 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maior Afonso de Cambra родилась около 1240 г. в местности камбра, авиро, Португалия, её отцу по имени Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Urraca Pires da Ribeira, 47. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maior Afonso de Cambra nació aproximadamente 1240, en Cambra, Aveiro, Portugal, su papá, Afonso Anes de Riba de Visela, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Urraca Pires da Ribeira, tenía 47 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Ferdinand Gonçalves de Chancino.
